subcodes.first_line: O spiritual child! May God strengthen thee. We have ever remembered thee, with heart and soul, in spirit and sweet fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الولد الروحانی ایدک الله انا لازال نذکرک قلبا بالروح و الریحان و اثر فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
